forbidden_wording: external ground truth / true labels / validated against ground truth
required_caveat: Annotation-based reference labels, not ground truth; agreement is statistical, not absolute

allowed_wording: partial external agreement / moderate inter-annotator agreement
forbidden_wording: strong external validation / robust agreement / confirmed by annotators
required_caveat: Moderate agreement only; interpretations should be limited and qualified

allowed_wording: provisional labels pending further validation / insufficient agreement for validation
forbidden_wording: Any external agreement claim / validated / confirmed / corroborated
required_caveat: Agreement below acceptable threshold; labels should not be used for validation claims

allowed_wording: substantial onset localization agreement / clinically meaningful step agreement
forbidden_wording: perfect onset identification / exact step recovery

allowed_wording: mean error within half a step / acceptable ordinal accuracy
forbidden_wording: precise onset identification / exact onset recovery
required_caveat: MAE reflects average error; individual cases may have larger deviations
